currentState.routeSummary: Export the live anchored-selector helper stack into a route-facing leaf that remains honest about the open-problem boundary.
currentState.nextHonestMove: Prove or package the helper stack cleanly and checkpoint the route if the leaf closes.

executionRule.summary: Treat the task list as a concrete research loop for problem 857: execute the highest-value task itself, not wrapper prose about the task.
afterEachCompletion: Re-read the theorem loop, claim pass, formalization packet, formalization work packet, and verifier boundary.
Invent the next highest-value step from the updated evidence rather than following a stale fixed script.
Append that next step to the task list and refresh the canonical task-list artifacts.
executionRule.repetitionProtocol: To execute this loop 10 times or 100 times, complete the first ready task, refresh the task list, then use the regenerated ordering for the next pass.
executionRule.lowStressLongHorizonNote: This loop is meant to be safe for long-horizon execution because it re-ranks after every pass instead of committing to a blind fixed plan.

loopTemplate.title: Freeze the current north star and active theorem packet
loopTemplate.task: Freeze the current route `anchored_selector_linearization`, claim surface `frontier_supported_route`, and active theorem packet before widening the search.
loopTemplate.completionRule: The theorem loop, claim pass, and formalization packet all agree on the current route, next honest move, and active target.

loopTemplate.title: Audit theorem, claim, and formalization surfaces for consistency
loopTemplate.task: Audit the theorem loop, claim loop, claim pass, formalization packet, and formalization work packet for drift or contradictory wording.
loopTemplate.completionRule: The canonical theorem/search surfaces tell one consistent story about what is supported, what is open, and what the active work unit is.

loopTemplate.title: Verify canonical pack inputs against the latest route and verifier artifacts
loopTemplate.task: Verify that the pack-backed theorem surfaces still match the latest route packet, OPS details, and verifier-facing artifacts.
loopTemplate.completionRule: The canonical input packet for this loop remains current and trustworthy.

loopTemplate.title: Verify the current highest-value structural hook remains canonical
loopTemplate.task: Verify that the strongest supported structural hook still survives across the theorem and claim surfaces.
loopTemplate.completionRule: The primary theorem-facing hook still survives refresh and remains narrow enough to formalize honestly.

loopTemplate.title: Verify the current verifier boundary and next target
loopTemplate.task: Verify that the current verifier boundary and next target are stated honestly across the pack surfaces.
loopTemplate.completionRule: The verifier-facing boundary remains explicit even without a dedicated interval queue.

loopTemplate.title: State Claim Honestly
loopTemplate.task: State the candidate theorem-facing claim in pack language without overstating current support.
loopTemplate.completionRule: The first remaining gap is either discharged, narrowed, or replaced by a sharper one: state_claim_honestly: Write a claim statement that is no stronger than the active claim-pass support surface.

loopTemplate.title: Refresh the task list and rerank the next step
loopTemplate.task: Refresh the canonical task list after the completed work so the next iteration is driven by the newest theorem/search/verifier evidence.
loopTemplate.completionRule: The refreshed task list records the next highest-value action instead of relying on a stale fixed script.
